summary: Phase 8 — Property Detail Page + Razorpay mock booking flow — backend + frontend e2e all green. 19/19 backend pytest cases pass: GET /properties/{id} returns safe host info (full_name/city/profile_image/kyc_status/created_at/role; no email/phone/password); 404 on unknown id; razorpay_service.is_mock=True; create_order returns order_mock_*; mock_complete_payment signature verifies; invalid signature rejected; POST /bookings/ creates soft-lock booking with order_mock_ id; overlap returns 409; check_in==check_out returns 400; manually blocked dates return 409 (Phase 6 integration); confirm-payment with mock signature flips booking to 'confirmed' and inserts a booking-source blocked-date entry visible in /calendar/.../blocked-dates and in /ical-export. Phase 7 search and login-all-roles regression smoke green. Frontend: /property/{id} is public (loads without auth), title/gallery/host strip/description/amenities/availability calendar/sticky booking card/price breakdown all render; gallery prev/next cycles main image; cal-prev/next changes month label (May 2026 -> June 2026); past dates struck-through; check-in/out/guests inputs work; clicking Book Now while logged-out redirects to /login; as guest, fills 2026-12-20..2026-12-23 -> Book Now -> /guest/booking-confirmation?booking_id=BK… renders 'Reservation held', booking-id, soft-lock-card with countdown ticking from 09:59 -> 09:57, confirmation-total ₹18,432 matches detail breakdown, back-to-search returns to /guest/browse; replaying same window returns 409 surfaced as 'Property is already booked for selected dates' in booking-error; as host, Book Now displays inline guard 'Only guests can make bookings.'
action_items: Wire real Razorpay checkout in BookingConfirmation (currently shows 'Payment integration is in mock mode' notice). Backend already supports both mock and live modes via is_mock flag.
Optional: extract calendar grid from PropertyDetail.js into a shared component — same pattern is duplicated in HostCalendar.

Optional: confirm-payment endpoint takes 4 query params (booking_id, razorpay_order_id, razorpay_payment_id, razorpay_signature). Consider switching to a Pydantic body model for cleaner client integration.
critical_code_review_comments: booking_routes.confirm_payment uses untyped str function args, so FastAPI treats them as query parameters. Works but is non-idiomatic; a ConfirmPaymentRequest Pydantic body model would be cleaner and self-documents in /docs.

PropertyDetail.js is ~580 lines with calendar matrix, gallery, booking card and host strip colocated. Approaching the 700 LOC threshold from coding guidelines — split before adding reviews/photos-modal in next phase.
PropertyDetail.fetchBlockedDates queries a wide window (today..year+2). Fine at current data scale but consider lazy-loading per visible month to reduce payload as bookings/blocks grow.
razorpay_service is instantiated as a module-level singleton at import time. Switching from demo to live keys requires a backend restart — acceptable for now, but document this in deploy notes.
test_credentials: guest@propnest.com/guest123 and host@propnest.com/host123 verified working from /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing demo properties prop_demo_1_1778066214 (Sea Breeze Villa) and prop_demo_6_1778066214 (Hill Cottage). Created and confirmed two test bookings on free 2026-12 windows; one block-date range (2026-11-15..2026-11-18) created and cleaned up by the test_blocked_date_rejected test. New 'booking'-source blocked-date entries from confirmed bookings remain in DB by design (Phase 6 integration).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 8 regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_phase8_property_detail.py. Run via `pytest backend/tests/test_phase8_property_detail.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/phase8_results.xml`. Razorpay is in demo/mock mode (RAZORPAY_KEY_ID=rzp_test_demo_key) — use razorpay_service.mock_complete_payment(order_id) to generate a valid HMAC signature for /bookings/confirm-payment. confirm-payment expects QUERY params (not JSON body). PropertyDetail route /property/:id is public (no ProtectedRoute wrapper); /guest/booking-confirmation requires guest auth. Container date is 2026-05-06; future windows 2026-12-* and 2027-01-* are free (except 2026-12-01..04, 2026-12-15..18, 2026-12-20..23 which now have confirmed bookings on demo property 6 from this run).
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA. Initial Playwright run had a selector ambiguity (`button:has-text('Login')` matched the login-tab instead of submit) — switched to `[data-testid='login-submit']` and all flows passed. One backend test originally used category='short_term_rental' which is not in PropertyCategory enum; switched to a plain limit search. Both were test-script issues, not application bugs.
